Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class StringCheck

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<StringCheck,String>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.StringCheck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<StringCheck,String>
public final class StringCheck extends AbstractCheck<StringCheck,String>
Fluent assertions for String values.

    • matchesAndCaptures

      public MatchResultCheck matchesAndCaptures(String regex)
      Matches the string against a regex and returns a MatchResultCheck for asserting on captured groups. 
      
 checkThat(logLine).matchesAndCaptures("(\\w+) (\\d+)")
     .hasGroupCount(2)
     .group(1).isEqualTo("ERROR");
